title: Wolfspeed (WOLF) Q2 Earnings Preview
text: Wolfspeed is anticipated to report declining earnings and lower revenues for its December 2024 quarter, with results expected on January 29, 2025. Expected quarterly loss: $1.01 per share (down 83.6% year-over-year). Projected revenues: $179.37 million (down 13.9% from prior year). Earnings ESP: -2.49% (suggesting recent analyst pessimism). Zacks Rank: #3 (Hold). The consensus EPS estimate has been revised slightly upward by 0.74% over the past month. However, the company's Most Accurate Estimate is lower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate, suggesting that analysts have recently become bearish. In the previous quarter, Wolfspeed beat expectations, posting a loss of $0.91 per share versus the anticipated $1.01, delivering a 9.90% surprise. Over four quarters, the company has beaten consensus estimates three times. The analysis suggests Wolfspeed does not appear a compelling earnings-beat candidate, though investors should consider additional factors beyond earnings expectations.
